div.p: This value set includes codes based on the following rules:

ul.li: Include all codes defined in http://snomed.info/sct
Include all codes defined in http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-nl
Include all codes defined in http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icpc-1-nl

description.value: De Zorgviewer probleem naam waardelijst o.b.v. de DHD Diagnose Thesaurus (SNOMED CT en ICD-10-nl codes) en de ICPC-1 NL coderingen vanuit de huisartsen

copyright.value: This value set includes content from SNOMED CT, which is copyright © 2002+ International Health Terminology Standards Development Organisation (IHTSDO), and distributed by agreement between IHTSDO and HL7. Implementer use of SNOMED CT is not covered by this agreement
